commits.message: feat: Resend email integration (welcome, purchase confirmation, audience sync) (#32)
commits.author: shalomer

panels.title: feat: Resend email integration
panels.scene: Villagers are screaming with joy as letters rain from the sky. A child catches a letter that says 'Welcome to our Kingdom!' and starts crying tears of happiness. Knight stands calmly, arms crossed, under a small, localized raincloud of emails.

panels.title: feat: Resend email integration
panels.scene: A villager kneels before the knight, offering a newly-baked pie. Other villagers are constructing a giant stone mailbox with the knight's face on it.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We'll never miss a confirmation email again!

panels.title: feat: Resend email integration
panels.scene: A frantic villager shows another villager a parchment with a timestamp on it. They're both pointing at it with wide eyes. The knight sighs.

panels.title: 1 commit. Feature Complete. Emails Sent.
panels.scene: The knight sits slumped against a giant stone mailbox. Villagers are crowding around, taking selfies with the mailbox. One is trying to mail a cat. The knight looks exhausted.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: This is the greatest day of my life!
